allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "--- where winget ---"; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "--- where git ---"; \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($p="C:\\Users\\HP\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-HP-Desktop-DiamondDashboard\\ac2eb294-fbfb-4eac-9c5b-e749b2f65f11\\tasks\\bhqebhaec.output"; Get-Content $p -Raw | Select-Object -Last 1 | ForEach-Object { $_ }; Write-Output "==="; \(Get-Content $p\) | Select-String -Pattern "error|warn|fail|compiled|GET /" -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -Last 20)
PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null; Write-Output "warmed" } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($cmds = 'python','py','python3'; foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "$c -> $\($g.Source\)" } }; "---"; \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\))

PowerShell($p = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\ngrok.exe"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p"; & $p version } else { Write-Output "Not at Links, searching..."; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -Recurse -Filter ngrok.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet" -Recurse -Filter ngrok.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Write-Output "---LINKS---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---WHERE---"; cmd /c "where ngrok 2>nul")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Set-Location C:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\GoldBot; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m py_compile server\\app.py server\\store.py server\\executor.py; if \($?\) { Write-Output "SYNTAX OK" })
